message:
feat: wire VCR into integration tests

Both e2e.test.ts and agent.integration.test.ts now use VCR clients.
Each test gets its own cassette. VCR_MODE env var controls behavior:
record (real API calls + save), replay (use fixtures), off (bypass).

Also add "off" mode passthrough to vcr.ts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
